subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! Your letter was received and your intimate supplications were made known. In truth I say that in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت پیمان نامه شما رسید و راز و نیاز معلوم گردید براستی میگویم که در این
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
